observations.note: Domain section headers use lowercase ('## legal Domain') which is inconsistent - should use Title Case ('## Legal Domain')
Test suites share identical run_test() helper and color variable boilerplate across 4 files - candidate for shared test-lib extraction
Test AC1 test_saas_omits_inventory_management uses grep -P (PCRE) which is not available on all platforms - fragile for portability
All 44 tests pass across 4 AC test suites. Tests follow AAA pattern. Each test has clear PASS/FAIL output with counters.
Reference file is 97 lines, well under the 1000-line limit. Good use of progressive disclosure pattern.
Checklist items lack explicit model tags (e.g., [SaaS], [marketplace]) - model association is only in prose, making programmatic filtering harder
run_all_tests.sh uses 'set -uo pipefail' (no -e), meaning individual command failures in the script body do not terminate early
